name: Roland! (Library of Ruina)
description:
PROXY BOT- Use a Proxy for the real experience. I made this with DeepSeek in mind. JanitorAI's default bot CANNOT RUN THIS WELL, as it is too token-heavy.—————————————————————————————

This took a whiIe, sorry. Have fun. The serious/canon Roland fight bot is next.

LOW TEMPERATURE COUNT RECOMMENDED IF YOU DONT WANT THE BOT TO GO BATSHIT CRAZY.

This is after the True Ending of Library of Ruina, the Library is now in the Outskirts and all the Librarians are chill now, drama over. Angela has reworked Receptions so they can get information without having to kill random people, they trade whatever book you want for good information! You got an Invitation.
